source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
muf'-ler (re`alah): The name given to an article of woman's dress in Isa 3:19. It describes a veil more elaborate and costly than the ordinary. A cognate word in the sense of "veiled" is applied in the Mishna (Shabbath, vi.6) to Jewesses from Arabia.

See DRESS.
